claims.comparison_population: chronic HCV patients with advanced liver fibrosis vs early-stage disease (FIB-4 <1.45)
claims.supporting_quote: Primary outcome of advanced liver disease was defined as FIB-4 >3.25 during follow-up... 2787 (65.0%) patients had a FIB-4 <1.45. Advanced liver disease developed in 821 patients.
